html:
The Orange Gem is an item used to craft two Ancient items in Don't Starve Together. It can be used to craft The Lazy Forager, which automatically collects items, and The Lazy Explorer, which teleports the player a short distance across the screen.

Orange Gems can be inserted into Cratered Moonrocks to acquire an Orange Moonlens. They can also be used to power Winona's G.E.M.erator.

Nutrition Facts

Critter Produces Notes
Orange Gems have a mineral value of 5.
Loyalty (When hand-fed) Adds 3 minutes (6 day segments) of Follower time, with questionable efficiency.
Nothing! Though it does delay their starvation.

Gathering

Orange Gems are obtained by:

  • mining Ancient Statues
  • destroying Broken Clockworks
  • opening Ornate Chests
  • hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Stations
  • killing Dragonfly which drops 1-2 Orange Gems
  • gathering them from Cave Holes in the Ruins by using a The Lazy Forager
  • looting the Large Ornate Chest, which has a chance to contain Orange Gems each time the Ancient Guardian is killed
  • hammering Sunken Chests, which has a 5% chance of dropping Orange Gems
  • getting presents under a Winter's Feast Tree (only during Winter's Feast)
  • destroying the Table and Chair Relics, which have a roughly 0.2% chance to drop Orange Gems
  • harvesting Tumbleweeds, which have a roughly 0.02% chance to drop Orange Gems
  • crafting them with as Wilson with the "Transmute Gems II" skill

Usage

×3

×2

×2

×2

×3

Obtained by inserting the Gem into the Cratered Moonrock.

Trivia

  • The Orange Gem's element appears to be sloth; its opposite being the Green Gem.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

“It's an orange gem.”
–Wilson
“This one makes my fingers tingle.”
–Willow
“Pretty rock.”
–Wolfgang
“Such things used to bring me happiness.”
–Wendy
“IT SHIMMERS IN MY HANDS.”
–WX-78
“It looks like a Spessartite garnet.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's shimmering.”
–Woodie
“This will be quite powerful with some fuel.”
–Maxwell
“Curious, prismatic shapes such as this never occur naturally.”
–Wagstaff
“A stöne öf örange.”
–Wigfrid
“Orange you glad we found you, gem?”
–Webber
“I miss oranges...”
–Warly
“Helper Shiny”
–Wormwood
“I don't like it.”
–Winona
“Bright and orange like a... a...”
–Wortox
“Weird orangey rock.”
–Wurt
“Orange you glad I found this orange gem? Ha ha, nice one Walter.”
–Walter
“It's beautiful, but more or less useless as it is.”
–Wanda
